title: Union with the smaller arm declared before its superset
description: mion union.spec.ts 'sortUnreachableTypes' — `{a}` defined before `{a; b}`. Both arms must be reachable: matching SmallObj must not swallow LargeObj-shaped inputs (semantically the same since either arm matching returns true, but pins the regression).
notes: When one arm is a subset of another (e.g., `{a}` and `{a; b}`), any value satisfying the smaller arm passes — even if extra props would also satisfy the larger arm. Order in the type union does not affect the result.
schema: createValidate(RT.union([RT.object({a: RT.string()}), RT.object({a: RT.string(), b: RT.number()})]))
generated:
function YOw_OaQkCOI(v){return (typeof v === 'object' && v !== null && typeof v.a === 'string' && Number.isFinite(v.b))}

function YOw_Rh5VPfX(v){return (typeof v === 'object' && v !== null && typeof v.a === 'string')}
